attacking_style: Pure sprinter relying on leadout train positioning rather than attacking. Finishes races in organized bunch sprints with team support.
team_tactics: Lotto-Soudal commits full leadout train resources to deliver DE LIE optimally positioned into final sprint. High-stakes deployment reflects team's broader strategic needs.
terrain_preference: Flat bunch sprint finishes where leadout organization determines outcome. Exposed when positioning alone insufficient against superior pure sprinters.
vulnerability: Cannot overcome top-tier sprinters even from optimal positioning. Conversion rate appears weak when facing WorldTour-level sprint competition despite full team support.
key_patterns: Requires full leadout infrastructure to compete, not self-sufficient in positioning battles.
Fourth place from optimal position indicates finishing speed deficit versus elite sprinters.
form_trajectory: neutral: Single observation shows good positioning but conversion weakness; insufficient data for trajectory assessment
